quote_original: If you wish to continue, you will return to your original quote without ranges
quote_copy: Make a copy of this quote
name: Name
contact_specialist: Contact your specialist for more details
cancellation_policy_description:
You have until 03/21/2023 to cancel without penalty.
After that date USD 116.00 will be charged
category_have: Must have at least one category
allowed_per_room_type: Only one rate allowed per room type
detele_service_description: You are one step away from eliminating the service
all_detele_service_description: You are one step away from eliminating the selected services
eliminating_quote: You are one step away from eliminating the entire quote
saved_correctly: Your quote has been saved correctly. You can find it in My quotes.
enter_name_save: Enter the new name under which you will save your quote:
removing_extension: You are one step away from removing the extension
extension_marked_optional: This extension is marked as optional, it will not be considered in the final price of your quote.
service_marked_optional: This service is marked as optional, it is not considered in the final price of your quote.
service_marked_no_optional: This service is marked as not optional, it is considered in the final price of your quote.
with_reservation_passengers: To continue with the reservation, confirm the exact number of passengers and review the accommodation selected in your quote.
details_quote: See the details of your quote
prices_vary_based: Hotel status and prices vary based on availability during the quoting process.
tell_something: If you want to tell us something, don't hesitate to contact us
biodiversity_peruvian: Discover the great biodiversity of the Tambopata National Reserve and observe the flora and fauna of the Peruvian Amazon.
package_quote_selected: You do not have a package/quote selected
save_before_continuing: We suggest you save before continuing.
replace_before_continuing:
You are about to
replace the quote you are working on!
fill_information_passengers: Fill out your passengers' information now and expedite the purchase of tickets to guarantee their entry to Machu Picchu on the desired date.
reservation_code: If you have your own reservation code enter it here:
required_communications: Required for automatic communications about your trip and itinerary through our digital tool. For more information.
escreva_nota: Write a note for your account executive that they can view in the communication
sending_reservation: We will be sending the reservation confirmation to your email.
sending_reservation_no: If you did not receive confirmation of your reservation, you can contact the technical support area with the code
with_masi_1: Consult services, report incidents or report problems with your flight
with_masi_2: Know the temperature of the destination, ideal clothing, exchange rate before traveling
with_masi_3: Know your itinerary, places to visit, schedules, directions and maps during your trip
it_recommended_descri: Comfortable and light clothing for visiting the coastal areas of Peru, while for the high Andean zone the use of warm clothing is recommended. Sunscreen, sunglasses, hat and mosquito repellent can be very useful during your stay.
it_recommended_descri_no: It is not recommended that visitors wear sleeveless shirts, shorts, short skirts or short clothing when visiting religious temples or official buildings.
train_machu: On the train to Machu Picchu
train_machu_des: Bring the same document that you presented to the agency, since the train and entrance tickets to Machu Picchu will be issued with the same information. You will find your luggage at the chosen hotel.
bus_country_des: The passenger has the right to transport up to 20 kg of luggage in the hold and 5 kg in a carry-on suitcase. The excess will be allowed according to the capacity of the bus and will have an additional cost.
entry_peru_des: Be sure to ask your embassy if you need a VISA to enter Peru (or any other country included in your itinerary). Lima Tours is not responsible if a guest does not have all the necessary documentation to enter the country. The foreign person traveling to Peru must ensure that the validity of their passport is not less than 6 months to enter the national territory.
guide_peru_des: Learn more about your destination with this travel guide.
has_rate_dynamic_description: Hotel with dynamic rates subject to change.

label.content_processing_quote: The quote is temporarily locked while updates are being performed. This process may take a few moments. We will notify you as soon as it is available again.

label.delete_category_confirmation: Are you sure you want to delete this category? This action cannot be undone.

label.passport_renewal_warning: Renew your passport, as immigration will not allow entry to the country.

notification.quote_updated_success: The quote has been updated successfully

question.propagate_date_change: Do you want to modify the dates of the following services?

modal.shift_service_message: You are adding a service on a date that already has services. How would you like to proceed?
modal.action_shift_desc: Add the new service on the set date and move all subsequent services.
modal.action_add_here_desc: Add the new service on this date without moving other services.

modal.date_conflict_confirm_desc: Move the service to {date} ignoring the conflict.
modal.date_conflict_cancel_desc: Keep the service on its original date ({date}).
